title: Outlook / Email Client Setup on a New Device
text:
Q: How do I set up Outlook or my email client on a new device?
A: Windows: Step 1 - Open Outlook from the Start menu or desktop shortcut. Step 2 - When prompted, select 'Next' to start the setup process. Step 3 - Choose 'Email Account' and click 'Next'. Step 4 - Enter your name, email address, and password, then click 'Next'. Step 5 - Outlook will test your account settings; once completed, click 'Finish'. macOS: Step 1 - Open Outlook from the Applications folder or Dock. Step 2 - If prompted, select 'Get Started' to begin the setup. Step 3 - Choose 'Add Account' and select 'Exchange' or 'Other' based on your email type. Step 4 - Enter your email address and password, then click 'Add Account'. Step 5 - Outlook will verify your account settings; once done, click 'Done'. For both systems, if you encounter issues, ensure your internet connection is active and check with IT for correct server settings or credentials.
